text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week looks wilted as she comes in, and
closer inspection reveals bags under her eyes.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I had a dream where these angry, giant carrots in
armor kept yelling that I have to eat daikon
radishes...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I'm so tired... I don't even know why I had that
nightmare. I love daikon radishes...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The strange dream seems to torment Special
Week for quite a while...
